schedule.description: Story 5 — LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship

stories.title: McIlroy Wins Back-to-Back Masters — Joins the All-Time Club

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy won the 2026 Masters at -12.

Back-to-back champion. Joining Nicklaus (1965-66), Faldo (1989-90), Tiger (2001-02).

He double-bogeyed 4, bogeyed 6 — then birdied 7, 8, 12, 13.

18th hole: trees, bunker, chip, 2-putt. One-shot win. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 final leaderboard:

-12: McIlroy 🏆
-11: Scheffler
-10: Young / Henley / Rose / Hatton

Young and Rose both held 2-shot leads on Sunday. Augusta had other plans. #TheMasters #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: McIlroy Wins Back-to-Back Masters, Joins Nicklaus, Faldo, Tiger in Exclusive Club

stories.title: Scheffler's Bogey-Free 68 Makes Him RBC Heritage Favorite

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler shot a bogey-free 68 on Masters Sunday.

Finished runner-up at -11. One shot back.

He is now the +350 favorite at the RBC Heritage this week — a significant gap ahead of the rest.

In 2024, he won BOTH the Masters AND RBC Heritage. #RBCHeritage #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: Scheffler's Bogey-Free Masters Sunday Makes Him Clear RBC Heritage Favorite

stories.title: RBC Heritage Preview — Harbour Town Without McIlroy

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The RBC Heritage starts Thursday at Harbour Town Golf Links.

No Rory McIlroy — he's resting after the Masters.

But the field is loaded: Scheffler (+350), Thomas, Spieth, Young, Morikawa, Henley.

82 players. $20M purse. No cut. #RBCHeritage #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: RBC Heritage Preview: Scheffler Leads a Star Field at Harbour Town Without McIlroy

stories.title: LIV Golf Mexico City — 72-Hole Format Debuts at Chapultepec

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf goes to Mexico City this week.

April 16-19. Club de Golf Chapultepec. Over 7,300 feet of elevation.

New for 2026: 72 holes. The first LIV event ever to go the full distance.

All 10 LIV players missed the Masters cut. Something has to give. #LIVGolf #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: LIV Golf Goes 72 Holes for First Time at High-Altitude Mexico City

stories.title: LPGA JM Eagle LA Championship — Korda Withdraws Before Final Major Tune-Up

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda withdrew from this week's LPGA event in Los Angeles.

The JM Eagle LA Championship (April 16-19, El Caballero CC) continues without the World No. 2.

Lauren Coughlin enters fresh off her 5-shot Aramco win. Last stop before the Chevron major. #LPGA #GolfFanrecap
